ns0:entry.ns0:title: SAPTARSHI-coder/EaseMotion-css
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SAPTARSHI-coder/EaseMotion-css
Language: html
Animation-first CSS framework with reusable UI components, modern effects, and zero dependencies. Lightweight, beginner-friendly, and open-source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sjj1024/PakePlus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sjj1024/PakePlus
Language: html
Turn any webpage/HTML/Vue/React and so on into desktop and mobile app under 5M with easy in few minutes. 轻松将任意网站/HTML/Vue/React等项目构建为轻量级(小于5M)多端桌面应用和手机应用仅需几分钟. https://ppofficial.netlify.app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sushegaad/Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sushegaad/Claude-Skills-Governance-Risk-and-Compliance
Language: html
Claude Skills for Governance, Risk, & Compliance (GRC): Expert-level compliance guidance for ISO 27001, SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, EU AI Act, ISO 42001, ISO 27701, DORA, CSRD, India's DPDPA, CMMC 2.0, NIST AI Risk, SWIFT, Australia's ISM, EU NIS2, and CCPA/CPRA. Benchmark 97% (with skills) vs 81% (without skills).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lancedb/lancedb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lancedb/lancedb
Language: html
Developer-friendly OSS embedded retrieval library for multimodal AI. Search More; Manage Less.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ossu/computer-science
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ossu/computer-science
Language: html
🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!
